relations.note: Both govern the rendering of the brand name string LISRAYA on first mention; casing and trademark marking apply together.

quotes: Always write **LISRAYA** in ALL CAPS in all written materials
Always write **LISRAYA** in ALL CAPS in all written materials (patient marketing rule; supersedes the Feb 2026 general guide's title-case rule).

rules.intent: Lock a single, consistent all-caps rendering of the brand name across patient materials, overriding a superseded title-case guideline.
rules.rule_text: The brand name must always be written LISRAYA in ALL CAPS (brand_name.case = all_caps) in all written patient marketing materials; this patient-marketing rule supersedes the earlier general guide's title-case treatment of the brand name.

quotes: Include the **® registered trademark symbol only when the generic name is included**
Generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`.
Apply on **first/most prominent mention only**, in **external-facing documents only**. Do not repeat ® on subsequent mentions.
Generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`.

rules.intent: Ensure correct, minimal, and compliant trademark marking tied to the generic name disclosure.
rules.rule_text: The ® registered trademark symbol may only appear when paired with the generic name in lowercase parentheses, e.g. LISRAYA® (brepocitinib); apply this pairing on the first/most prominent mention only, and only in external-facing documents — do not repeat ® on subsequent mentions.

quotes: sign-off lives in the locked footer — do not add it in sections
Parent company: Priovant Therapeutics, Inc. (sign-off lives in the locked footer — do not add it in sections).

rules.intent: Preserve the single, locked location for the legal parent-company attribution and prevent duplicate or misplaced sign-offs.
rules.rule_text: The parent company sign-off (Priovant Therapeutics, Inc.) is reserved for the locked footer (end_matter) only; it must never be added within body sections.
